    n, m = int(input_data[0]), int(input_data[1])
    a = input_data[2]
    b = input_data[3]
    
    L = n - m + 1

    match_cost = [sum(1 for j in range(m) if a[i+j] != b[j]) for i in range(L)]

solve()
